name: director-discord
description: Provides Discord features including text-to-speech announcements.
aiContext:
The Discord extension announces messages via text-to-speech in the race team voice channel.
- communication.announce: sends a TTS announcement to the configured Discord voice channel. Keep messages concise (under 20 words). Use for race calls, safety car, checkered flag announcements, and driver spotlights.

intents.title: Announce Message
intents.description: Announces a message via Discord TTS in the configured voice channel. Keep messages under 20 words. Use for race calls, safety car, and driver spotlights.

discord.channelId.description: The Voice Channel ID to join.
